title: Fermium
description: A mix of Optimizing Mods and Utility mods made to make the game optimized and ready for everything
body:
![Fermium Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c997f35a013a9c1873ce9a776956070a86592175_0.webp)

# Fermium
Spiritually a successor to Optimaly Optimized, Fermium aims to have perfect experience for any situation whether it is content or your bog standard survival, or playing with friends! .
The Modpack was originally intended to work with The FinalLife SMP, but decided to release it due to the sheer usability of the ModPack

## What is this for?
Fermium aims to be as stable as possible, whilst offering many options regarding content and more.

## Features!
- Voice Chat Enabled (Both Simple Voice Chat And Plasmo)
- Cinematic Mods (Replay and/or FlashBack)
- World Sharing Via E4MC
- The most popular optimization mods available (Sodium, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast ecc)
- Shader Support (Iris)
- Chat Heads
- Switching between alt accounts.
- Joining Older/Newer Servers (ViaFabricPlus (PLEASE DEACTIVATE THIS IF YOU WANNA USE FLASHBACK))

Made with 💚 by Lumi
